name: Field Nation Field Service Marketplace API
what_it_does: Field Nation field service marketplace REST API for enterprises, IT service providers, and managed service providers (MSPs) to source, manage, and pay on-demand field technicians for IT and field service work. Enables AI agents to manage work order creation and publication for field service dispatch automation, handle technician sourcing and assignment from the Field Nation marketplace for workforce procurement automation, access technician vetting and credential verification for compliance automation, retrieve real-time work order status and technician location for field service monitoring automation, manage technician payment and milestone-based billing for field service financial automation, handle quality assurance and work order completion verification for service quality automation, access SLA tracking and escalation management for service delivery automation, retrieve analytics and performance reporting for field service operations automation, manage multi-location field service programs for enterprise deployment automation, and integrate Field Nation with ITSM platforms (ServiceNow, Remedy), ERP, and workforce management for end-to-end field service marketplace automation.
use_cases: Dispatching field technicians from IT service deployment agents
Sourcing contractors from on-demand workforce automation agents
Tracking work order completion from field service monitoring agents
Managing SLA compliance from service delivery automation agents
not_for: Employee field service workforce management (Field Nation is contractor marketplace)
Consumer home service booking (enterprise B2B focus)
Healthcare field service with clinical license requirements
best_when: An enterprise, IT service provider, or MSP wanting AI agents to automate field technician sourcing, work order dispatch, on-demand workforce coordination, and payment within Field Nation's field service contractor marketplace.
avoid_when: WORKER CLASSIFICATION INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR vs EMPLOYEE: Field Nation provides access to independent contractors; automated large-scale engagement of Field Nation contractors for regular recurring work without proper worker classification creates AB5 (California) and IRS worker misclassification risk; automated work order patterns that resemble employee work engagement require worker classification review. TECHNICIAN CREDENTIAL VERIFICATION TIMING: Field Nation technician credential verification (background check, certifications) has lead time before first work order assignment; automated just-in-time technician sourcing for time-sensitive deployments must account for credential verification time; automated work order assignment to unverified technicians creates compliance and quality risk. WORK ORDER SCOPE DEFINITION FOR CONTRACTOR PAYMENT: Field Nation payment disputes arise from ambiguous work order scope; automated work order generation must include clear, specific scope of work, completion criteria, and deliverable definition; automated vague work orders create payment dispute risk when technician and buyer disagree on completion.

auth.notes: Field Nation uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Minneapolis, Minnesota HQ. Founded 2008 by Mynul Khan. Backed by Spectrum Equity, Insight Partners ($125M+ raised). 1M+ credentialed field workers. 60,000+ companies. Products: Field service marketplace, work order management, contractor management, analytics. Integration: ServiceNow, Remedy, SAP, Salesforce. Industries: IT field service, telecom, retail technology, healthcare IT. Competes with WorkMarket (ADP subsidiary) and Upwork for IT field service contractor marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-work-order marketplace fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-work-order marketplace fee; enterprise subscription for high-volume programs; managed service provider pricing
pricing.notes: Minneapolis MN. Spectrum Equity, Insight Partners backed. Per-work-order fee. Enterprise subscription. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; work order and technician queries throttled; webhooks for work order status, assignment, and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: TECHNICIAN ASSIGNMENT MARKETPLACE DYNAMICS: Field Nation technicians self-select work orders based on pay rate, location, and skills; automated work order creation at below-market pay rates creates low technician response rate; automated dispatch workflows must calibrate pay rate to market rates for target technician profiles to achieve coverage targets

WORK ORDER COMPLETION VERIFICATION DELAY: Field Nation work order completion requires buyer verification before payment release; automated payment release workflows must implement completion verification step; automated payment on technician completion claim without buyer verification creates payment for incomplete or non-compliant work

GEOGRAPHIC COVERAGE GAPS FOR RURAL DEPLOYMENTS: Field Nation technician density varies by metro vs rural geography; automated deployment planning that assumes uniform technician availability creates coverage failure in rural areas; implement technician availability pre-check for target locations before automated work order publication

SERVICENOW INTEGRATION BIDIRECTIONAL SYNC LATENCY: Field Nation ServiceNow integration syncs work order status bidirectionally; status sync has latency (minutes to hours) between platforms; automated ITSM workflows that expect real-time Field Nation status in ServiceNow must account for sync latency; direct Field Nation API polling provides faster status than ITSM integration

PAYMENT DISPUTE RESOLUTION TIMELINE: Field Nation payment disputes between buyers and technicians have defined resolution process and timeline (5-7 business days); automated payment dispute triggering creates work stoppage with resolution timeline; automated quality exception workflows should reserve dispute as last resort with manual review before dispute filing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field service marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Work order, contractor, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Work order and contractor data.
